site.name: Wanderlust
site.description: A personal travel bucket list website showcasing dream destinations, visited places, and a wish list of future adventures. Every destination tells a story.
site.stack: HTML / Tailwind CSS CDN / Vanilla JavaScript

design_system.style: Dark luxury, cinematic, editorial, atmospheric — National Geographic meets high-end travel journal

ui_ux_pro_max.purpose: Generated design system — colors, typography, spacing, motion tokens

firecrawl.purpose: Scraped nationalgeographic.com/travel for editorial layout reference

21st_dev_magic.reason: Returned no usable component code — hero built manually

google_stitch.purpose: Project created (ID: 5629113597675187401); sections built manually from brief

nano_banana_2.reason: Insufficient account balance — images generated externally via AI and placed in images/

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Full-viewport cinematic hero with Ken Burns zoom, staggered fade+rise text, gold CTA buttons, pulsing scroll indicator

sections.name: Stats Strip
sections.description: 4 animated count-up counters: countries visited, cities, on my list, memories

sections.name: Places I've Wandered
sections.description: 3-column equal destination card grid — Kyoto, Santorini, Marrakech — with hover image scale and overlay description reveal

sections.name: Quote / My Story
sections.description: Full-bleed parallax section with cinematic italic blockquote and gold attribution

sections.name: My Bucket List
sections.description: 6 numbered destination image cards in a 3-column grid — Hokkaido, Machu Picchu, Westfjords, Danakil, Antarctica, Tiger's Nest

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Minimal dark footer with logo, nav links, SVG social icons

animations: Ken Burns slow zoom on hero background (12s ease-out)
Staggered fade+rise on hero elements (eyebrow 0.3s → title 0.5s → subtitle 0.7s → buttons 0.9s → scroll indicator 1.2s)
IntersectionObserver scroll reveal on all sections (threshold 0.12, translateY 30px → 0)
Count-up animation on stats (1800ms ease-out cubic)
Destination card image scale on hover (1.07)
Destination card description max-height reveal on hover
Parallax background on quote section (background-attachment: fixed, disabled on touch devices)
Gold number opacity shift on wish list hover
accessibility: Landmark regions: header, nav, main, footer
aria-label on all icon buttons and interactive elements
prefers-reduced-motion: collapses all transforms to 200ms opacity only
tabindex=0 on destination cards for keyboard navigation

seo.title: Wanderlust — The world is calling.
seo.description: A curated list of dream destinations, places visited, and adventures still to come. Every destination, a story.
